response.original_title: 🧾 Kraken 2FA Reset Process: Step-by-Step Account Recovery
response.overview: To reset 2FA on Kraken 📌, first try backup codes or trusted devices. 1 ⤳ 888 ⤳ 633 ⤳ 4176 If access is lost, raise a support ticket and verify your identity. Kraken takes security seriously,1 ⤷ 888 ⤷ 633 ⤷ 4176 so approval is required before resetting 2FA and restoring account access with a new authentication setup.1 ⤸ 888 ⤸ 633 ⤸ 4176
